settings.text: Questions about classes, pricing, or private sessions? We'd love to hear from you. Drop by the studio, give us a call, or send us a message — we usually respond within a few hours.

settings.title: Hours
settings.text:
Mon–Fri: 6 AM–9 PM
Sat: 7 AM–6 PM
Sun: 8 AM–4 PM

settings.title: I've never done yoga before. Is that okay?
settings.content: Absolutely. Most of our classes welcome all levels, and every instructor offers modifications. Restorative and Gentle Flow are great starting points. Your first class is free — come see how it feels.

settings.title: Do I need to bring my own mat?
settings.content: Nope. We provide high-quality mats, blocks, straps, and bolsters at no extra charge. If you prefer your own mat, you're welcome to bring it.

settings.title: How do I cancel my membership?
settings.content: Just email us or stop by the front desk. No contracts, no cancellation fees, no questions. We want you here because you want to be here.

settings.title: Do you offer teacher training?
settings.content: Yes — we run a 200-hour teacher training program every spring and fall. Applications open three months before each cohort. Email us for details and the current syllabus.
